mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, refresh_token, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens ( user_id, refresh_token, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiresAt} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET refresh_token = EXCLUDED.refresh_token, expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at, updated_at = NOW()
